Drop real `.glb` product models in this folder to replace the procedural furniture automatically.

Supported filenames:

- `sofa_3seater.glb`
- `loveseat.glb`
- `armchair.glb`
- `coffee_table.glb`
- `dining_table.glb`
- `dining_chair.glb`
- `bed_queen.glb`
- `wardrobe.glb`
- `bookshelf.glb`
- `office_desk.glb`
- `tv_stand.glb`
- `side_table.glb`
- `floor_lamp.glb`
- `metal_locker.glb`

Notes:

- Keep models centered near the origin with the base resting at `y = 0` when possible.
- Use real-world scale in meters for the best AR sizing.
- The app falls back to the built-in procedural model if a `.glb` file is missing.
